Video.summary: Dig's Rod Shop unveils a '47 Chevy pickup: a "Zey Bronze" stunner with 640hp and unique barn wood details.
Video.title: Digs Rod Shop - 1947 Chevy 3100

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: We transform our classic C-10 with bodywork and a flawless pearl two-tone finish.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 8: Pearlfection

Video.summary: "Dark Matters," Jason Mode's '68 C10, is a subtly modded, powerful truck with killer black and red style.
Video.title: Jason Mode - Dark Matters C10

Video.summary: We’ll drive, teardown, and media blast a 1974 Bronco to uncover what lies beneath 40+ years of abuse.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco

Video.summary: With the help of some master craftsmen, the guys start building a Bronco from the ground up.
Video.title: Building A Bronco

Video.summary: Our ’74 Bronco build is getting a suspension overhaul plus new axles, brakes, wheels and tires!
Video.title: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Image.alt: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Video.summary: It’s time to mock everything in place in our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Mocking Up a New 1974 Bronco

Video.summary: We welcome legendary custom car builder Chris Ryan and his team to help with our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Image.alt: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Video.summary: It’s final assembly for our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco

Image.alt: Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco
Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco
Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco

Video.summary: We wrap up the assembly of our Bronco.
Video.title: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Image.alt: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Video.summary: Today we finish the final assembly of our 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco with the installation of the interior.
Video.title: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Image.alt: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Video.summary: The guys work hard to finish their 1974 build under the hood, under the frame, and under the top.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Image.alt: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Video.summary: The guys show off the completed 1974 Bronco on the floor at SEMA.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Finale

Video.summary: We’re at Stovalls collision and wrecking service searching for a 4 wheel drive square body.
Video.title: How To Choose A Square Body

Image.alt: How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body

Video.summary: We picked up a 1985 Chevy K-10 with a plan to do a full rebuild.
Video.title: Hip to be Square Body

Video.summary: We lay out our plan to rebuild our 1985 Chevy K-10.
Video.title: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Image.alt: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Video.summary: The transformation continues on this clean '85 K-10 square body.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown

Video.summary: Our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body gets stripped, sanded and primed. Then we add a two-tone paint job.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint

Video.summary: The frame work for our 1985 Chevy K-10 is being blasted and painted.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Video.summary: We start reassembling our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body. We add steering, brakes, exhaust, and glass.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly

Video.summary: Our K-10 Square body is coming back to life with restoration parts, cooling, and electrical.
Video.title: Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Image.alt: Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive
Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive
Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Video.summary: We wrap up our Chevy K-10 square body build with the final assembly of trim work, bumpers, and more
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished

Video.summary: Brendon Graeves' 1000hp twin-turbo LS '11 BMW M3: a carbon-bodied drift monster engineered for domination!
Video.title: Hot Shots Drift Car

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew rescues a familiar green 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Driveway Rescue - 1971 Chevy Caprice

Video.summary: We kick off a new project, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, by searching through a big-body boneyard.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 1

Video.summary: We mock, swap, and drop in a new transmission to handle all the power we’re adding to our Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 2

Video.summary: Team kicks off a new resto-mod project with a rare, but rusted Mopar.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: '70 Challenger

Video.summary: Team salvages rotted out '70 Challenger with how-to weld in a new metal roof, drip rails and A-pillars.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: Roof Skin

Video.summary: Chassis guru Jeff Schwartz brings in his G-Machine chassis to convert uni-body Challenger to a full frame.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: Framed

Video.summary: Final Mopar sheet metal tech - how to weld in a new trunk pan and fabricate a front cowl panel from scratch.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: Body Beautiful

Video.summary: Team grafts world's first low deck, all aluminum Hemi and T56 six speed gearbox into '70 Challenger resto-mod.
Video.title: Crazy Hemi

Video.summary: Team fabs high flow EFI fuel system, serpentine belt drive and dual fan cooling system for '70 Hemi Challenger
Video.title: Mopar Makeovers

Video.summary: Project Ultraviolet, the 1970 Challenger Pro Touring ride takes its maiden voyage
Video.title: Ultraviolet Payoff

Video.summary: Project Cream Puff gets air-ride and a supercharger for a slammed, powerful C-10 street machine.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power
Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power
Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power

Video.summary: In the series launch we take a 1991 Chevy Suburban and transform it into ‘Project Unbreakable.’
Video.title: Project Unbreakable

Video.summary: It’s fabrication time on our Chevy Suburban we’re calling “Unbreakable”.
Video.title: Fab Four

Video.summary: Our GMC “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its new suspension.
Video.title: Suburban Suspension

Video.summary: Our “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its engine and transmission.
Video.title: Unbreakable Nears The Finish

Video.summary: Our Unbreakable Chevy Suburban makes its final preparations for payoff.
Video.title: Unbreakable Readies For The Mountain

Video.summary: The guys put Project Unbreakable, our ’91 Chevy Suburban, to the test at Adventure Off Road Park!
Video.title: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Image.alt: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Video.summary: Come along as we take a massive ‘91 GMC Suburban square body and turn it into a lifted off-road beast.
Video.title: An Unbreakable Suburban Transformation

Video.summary: With new wheels and tires and steering upgrade, the guys take their Chevy Suburban for a drive!
Video.title: Unbreakable Suburban Comes To Life

Video.summary: Our GM long block gets a big blower and a versatile EFI setup.
Video.title: Supercharged Stroker LS3

Video.summary: The 88 K1500 4WD gets slammed with a 4”-6” lowering kit.
Video.title: Installing 4/6 Lowering Kit on a Chevy K1500 4x4

Image.alt: Installing 4/6 Lowering Kit on a Chevy K1500 4x4
Installing 4/6 Lowering Kit on a Chevy K1500 4x4
Installing 4/6 Lowering Kit on a Chevy K1500 4x4

Video.summary: LT hoists the tired 350 from the engine compartment for a budget conscious 5.3L LS.
Video.title: LS Swap Do's & Don'ts on a Chevy K1500

Image.alt: LS Swap Do's & Don'ts on a Chevy K1500
LS Swap Do's & Don'ts on a Chevy K1500
LS Swap Do's & Don'ts on a Chevy K1500

Video.summary: There’s a new purpose and a new plan for our Chevy K1500.
Video.title: AWD vs. 4WD Chevy 1500

Video.summary: Our '88 K1500 AWD Chevy needs more fuel for the 5.3, so it’s time to feed the beast!
Video.title: Upgrading a K1500 5.3 Fuel System

Video.summary: LT shows how to build a custom exhaust, and Austin brings new life to a dull paint finish.
Video.title: Building a Custom K1500 Exhaust
